Aster is the root person of the family tree. Should be moved to Q1 someday

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
== Merged content ==
[[Category:Gaiad characters]]
[[sn:Aster]][[File:Esther.png|thumb]]
Esther is Sagittarius A*

She is sometimes called Astra, Aster, or Ishtar. 

She is the white catgirl and represents the [[Milky Way]] in contrast to [[Andromeda]] who represents the [[Andromeda Galaxy]].

She made the world by tearing up a ball of yarn, and made [[Andromeda]] out of the yarn. She made the milky way from her milk and impregnated it to produce life. 

But as the universe cooled most life died and she was left powerless and hopeless. But hoped that life could survive to see the reunification with [[Andromeda]] in [[Milkdromeda]] and the [[Omega Point]]


The yarn between her and [[Andromeda]] is personified as [[Triangula]]

==Correspondences==

* [[Wikipedia:Konjin|Konjin]] (syn cretized with Tenchi Kane no Kami)
* Tenchi Kane no Kami (identified witjh Ame no Minakanushi)
* [[Wikipedia:Ame no Minakanushi|Ame no Minakanushi]]
* [[Wikipedia:Suiten|Suiten]] (identified witjh Ame no Minakanushi)
* [[Wikipedia:Varuna|Varuna]] (identified with Suiten)
* [[Wikipedia:Myoken|Myoken]] (identified witjh Ame no Minakanushi)
* [[Wikipedia:Ziwei Emperor|Ziwei Emperor]] (identified with Myoken)
* [[Wikipedia:Vairocana|Vairocana]]
[[Category:First 250 notes]]
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Newest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
